fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the saved segment criteria.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the saved segment criteria.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: No. of Actions
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of actions that make up the segment criteria.
